nodes.name: Onychognathus
nodes.summary: Onychognathus（Onychognathus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Slender-billed starling、Pale-winged starling、Red-winged starling等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Waller's starling
nodes.summary: Waller's starling (Onychognathus walleri) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bioko, the Albertine Rift montane forests, the East African montane forests and the Eastern Arc forests. The common name and scientific name commemorates the English naturalist Gerald Waller. References
